arch_source: NVIDIA Blackwell Tuning Guide 13.3 + CUDA compute-capability table

P4_passB_masked_loads_safe.note: D2+D2==D so hi-half top index == D-1 when masked

P7_bank_conflict_free_vacuous.note: no tl shared alloc; QV_SCR is global DRAM

P8a_topk_rank_bijection.note: PROVEN symbolically at representative N=6 (N-independent total-order argument); desc-rank injective => exactly one element has rank==K (the torch.topk threshold)

P8b_topk_value_is_kth_largest.note: PROVEN symbolically at N=6,K=3 (N-independent); the rank-K logit equals torch.topk(k).values[-1]

P8c_topk_exhaustive_empirical_N16K8.note: random + heavy-tie + all-equal logit vectors at the REAL (N=16,K=8); exactly-one-rank-K AND kth==torch.topk(k).values[-1] AND 0 tie failures

P9_tile_validity_sm120.note: single CTA, num_stages=1; chosen num_warps validated empirically by microbench. Register count is CONDITIONAL on ptxas — run ncu to confirm spills.
